results.title: Cymatics — Wikipedia
results.judge_reason: Pure source-domain encyclopedia entry on cymatics/Chladni patterns; no LLM, attention, or diagnostic mechanism — not functionally equivalent to the proposed cross-domain candidate.

results.title: Resonant Modes for Circular and Polygonal Chladni Plates (PMC 2024)
results.judge_reason: Source-domain modal analysis paper on physical Chladni plates; no LLM application or attention-pattern mapping.

results.title: How Do Chladni Plates Visualize Sound — COMSOL
results.judge_reason: Engineering blog explaining Chladni-plate physics with Bessel modes; pure source-domain content, no LLM crossover.

results.title: Train Short, Test Long: Attention with Linear Biases (ALiBi)
results.judge_reason: ALiBi injects a fixed linear (non-sinusoidal, non-sweepable) bias for length extrapolation; no nodal-set readout or frequency-sweep diagnostic — different purpose and mechanism.

results.title: LM Uncertainty Quantification with Attention Chain (2025)
results.judge_reason: Aggregates attention patterns for uncertainty estimation; no sinusoidal residual bias, no frequency sweep, no nodal-quiescence concept.

results.title: Attention Consistency for LLMs Explanation (2025)
results.judge_reason: Examines attention-pattern stability under perturbation for interpretability but lacks resonance sweep or sinusoidal scalar injection.

results.title: Attention Sinks in Diffusion Language Models (2510.15731)
results.judge_reason: Studies position-specific attention sinks in diffusion LMs; quiescent-position analogy is loose, but no frequency sweep or Chladni-style modal diagnostic.

results.title: Efficient Attention Mechanisms for LLMs: A Survey (2507.19595)
results.judge_reason: Survey of efficient attention (linear/sparse/spectral) variants; explicitly does not address Chladni-style nodal diagnostics.
